tests.current_optimized_program:
define i32 @test(i8 range(i8 0, 6) %arg) {
  switch i8 %arg, label %else [
    i8 0, label %common.ret
    i8 4, label %common.ret
    i8 5, label %common.ret
  ]

common.ret:                                       ; preds = %0, %0, %0, %else
  %common.ret.op = phi i32 [ 1, %else ], [ 0, %0 ], [ 0, %0 ], [ 0, %0 ]
  ret i32 %common.ret.op

else:                                             ; preds = %0
  br label %common.ret
}

issue.title: [SimplifyCFG] Fold switch to wrapping range check
issue.author: nikic

comments.author: VedantParanjape
comments.body: I assume this issue is fixed as this landed: https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/156477

tests.test_body:
target datalayout = "e-m:e-i64:64-f80:128-n8:16:32:64-S128"

declare void @foo(i32)

define void @test7(i8 %a) {
; CHECK-LABEL: define void @test7(
; CHECK-SAME: i8 [[A:%.*]]) {
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[AND:%.*]] = and i8 [[A]], -2
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[AND]], -2
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.assume(i1 [[CMP]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SWITCH:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[A]], -1
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[SWITCH]], label [[TRUE:%.*]], label [[FALSE:%.*]]
; CHECK:       common.ret:
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret void
; CHECK:       true:
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @foo(i32 1)
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[COMMON_RET:%.*]]
; CHECK:       false:
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @foo(i32 3)
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[COMMON_RET]]
  %and = and i8 %a, -2
  %cmp = icmp eq i8 %and, -2
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %cmp)
  switch i8 %a, label %default [
    i8 -1, label %true
    i8 -2, label %false
    i8 0, label %also_dead
  ]

true:                                             ; preds = %0
  call void @foo(i32 1)
  ret void

false:                                            ; preds = %0
  call void @foo(i32 3)
  ret void

also_dead:                                        ; preds = %0
  call void @foo(i32 5)
  ret void

default:                                          ; preds = %0
  call void @foo(i32 2)
  ret void
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(inaccessiblemem: write)
declare void @llvm.assume(i1 noundef) #0

attributes #0 = { nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(inaccessiblemem: write) }
tests.source_program:
target datalayout = "e-m:e-i64:64-f80:128-n8:16:32:64-S128"

declare void @foo(i32)

define void @test7(i8 %a) {
  %and = and i8 %a, -2
  %cmp = icmp eq i8 %and, -2
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %cmp)
  switch i8 %a, label %default [
    i8 -1, label %true
    i8 -2, label %false
    i8 0, label %also_dead
  ]

true:                                             ; preds = %0
  call void @foo(i32 1)
  ret void

false:                                            ; preds = %0
  call void @foo(i32 3)
  ret void

also_dead:                                        ; preds = %0
  call void @foo(i32 5)
  ret void

default:                                          ; preds = %0
  call void @foo(i32 2)
  ret void
}

declare void @foo(i32)

  %and = and i8 %a, -2
  %cmp = icmp eq i8 %and, -2
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %cmp)
  %a.off = add i8 %a, 1

  call void @foo(i32 1)
  br label %common.ret

false:                                            ; preds = %0
  call void @foo(i32 3)
  br label %common.ret
}

tests.test_body:
target datalayout = "e-m:e-i64:64-f80:128-n8:16:32:64-S128"

declare void @foo(i32)

define void @test6(i8 %a) {
; CHECK-LABEL: define void @test6(
; CHECK-SAME: i8 [[A:%.*]]) {
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[AND:%.*]] = and i8 [[A]], -2
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[AND]], -2
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.assume(i1 [[CMP]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SWITCH:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[A]], -1
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[SWITCH]], label [[TRUE:%.*]], label [[FALSE:%.*]]
; CHECK:       common.ret:
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret void
; CHECK:       true:
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @foo(i32 1)
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[COMMON_RET:%.*]]
; CHECK:       false:
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @foo(i32 3)
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[COMMON_RET]]
  %and = and i8 %a, -2
  %cmp = icmp eq i8 %and, -2
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %cmp)
  switch i8 %a, label %default [
    i8 -1, label %true
    i8 -2, label %false
  ]

true:                                             ; preds = %0
  call void @foo(i32 1)
  ret void

false:                                            ; preds = %0
  call void @foo(i32 3)
  ret void

default:                                          ; preds = %0
  call void @foo(i32 2)
  ret void
}

tests.test_body:
target datalayout = "e-m:e-i64:64-f80:128-n8:16:32:64-S128"

declare void @foo(i32)

define void @test5(i8 %a) {
; CHECK-LABEL: define void @test5(
; CHECK-SAME: i8 [[A:%.*]]) {
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP:%.*]] = icmp ult i8 [[A]], 2
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @llvm.assume(i1 [[CMP]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SWITCH:%.*]] = icmp eq i8 [[A]], 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[SWITCH]], label [[TRUE:%.*]], label [[FALSE:%.*]]
; CHECK:       common.ret:
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret void
; CHECK:       true:
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @foo(i32 1)
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[COMMON_RET:%.*]]
; CHECK:       false:
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @foo(i32 3)
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[COMMON_RET]]
  %cmp = icmp ult i8 %a, 2
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %cmp)
  switch i8 %a, label %default [
    i8 1, label %true
    i8 0, label %false
  ]

true:                                             ; preds = %0
  call void @foo(i32 1)
  ret void

false:                                            ; preds = %0
  call void @foo(i32 3)
  ret void

default:                                          ; preds = %0
  call void @foo(i32 2)
  ret void
}

target datalayout = "e-m:e-i64:64-f80:128-n8:16:32:64-S128"

declare void @foo(i32)

define void @test(i1 %a) {
; CHECK-LABEL: define void @test(
; CHECK-SAME: i1 [[A:%.*]]) {
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SWITCH:%.*]] = icmp eq i1 [[A]], true
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[SWITCH]], label [[TRUE:%.*]], label [[FALSE:%.*]]
; CHECK:       common.ret:
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret void
; CHECK:       true:
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @foo(i32 1)
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[COMMON_RET:%.*]]
; CHECK:       false:
; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @foo(i32 3)
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[COMMON_RET]]
  switch i1 %a, label %default [
    i1 true, label %true
    i1 false, label %false
  ]

true:                                             ; preds = %0
  call void @foo(i32 1)
  ret void

false:                                            ; preds = %0
  call void @foo(i32 3)
  ret void

default:                                          ; preds = %0
  call void @foo(i32 2)
  ret void
}

tests.test_body:
define i8 @wrapping_range_phi(i8 %arg) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @wrapping_range_phi(
; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ARG_OFF:%.*]] = add i8 [[ARG:%.*]], -1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SWITCH:%.*]] = icmp ult i8 [[ARG_OFF]], -2
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SPEC_SELECT:%.*]] = select i1 [[SWITCH]], i8 0, i8 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[SPEC_SELECT]]
entry:
  switch i8 %arg, label %else [
    i8 0, label %if
    i8 -1, label %if
  ]

if:                                               ; preds = %else, %entry, %entry
  %i = phi i8 [ 0, %else ], [ 1, %entry ], [ 1, %entry ]
  ret i8 %i

else:                                             ; preds = %entry
  br label %if
}
tests.source_program:
define i8 @wrapping_range_phi(i8 %arg) {
entry:
  switch i8 %arg, label %else [
    i8 0, label %if
    i8 -1, label %if
  ]

if:                                               ; preds = %else, %entry, %entry
  %i = phi i8 [ 0, %else ], [ 1, %entry ], [ 1, %entry ]
  ret i8 %i

else:                                             ; preds = %entry
  br label %if
}
tests.current_optimized_program:
define i8 @wrapping_range_phi(i8 %arg) {
entry:
  %0 = sub i8 %arg, -1
  %switch.and = and i8 %0, -2
  %switch.selectcmp = icmp eq i8 %switch.and, 0
  %1 = select i1 %switch.selectcmp, i8 1, i8 0
  ret i8 %1
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
define i8 @wrapping_range_phi(i8 %arg) {
entry:
  %arg.off = add i8 %arg, -1
  %switch = icmp ult i8 %arg.off, -2
  %spec.select = select i1 %switch, i8 0, i8 1
  ret i8 %spec.select
}

tests.test_body:
declare i32 @f(i32)

define i32 @one_case_2(i32 %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @one_case_2(
; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SWITCH:%.*]] = icmp eq i32 [[X:%.*]], 5
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[SWITCH]], label [[A:%.*]], label [[B:%.*]]
; CHECK:       common.ret:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[COMMON_RET_OP:%.*]] = phi i32 [ [[TMP0:%.*]], [[A]] ], [ [[TMP1:%.*]], [[B]] ]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[COMMON_RET_OP]]
; CHECK:       a:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0]] = call i32 @f(i32 0)
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[COMMON_RET:%.*]]
; CHECK:       b:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1]] = call i32 @f(i32 1)
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[COMMON_RET]]
entry:
  switch i32 %x, label %unreachable [
    i32 5, label %a
    i32 10, label %b
    i32 11, label %b
    i32 12, label %b
    i32 13, label %b
  ]

unreachable:                                      ; preds = %entry
  unreachable

a:                                                ; preds = %entry
  %0 = call i32 @f(i32 0)
  ret i32 %0

b:                                                ; preds = %entry, %entry, %entry, %entry
  %1 = call i32 @f(i32 1)
  ret i32 %1
}
tests.source_program:
declare i32 @f(i32)

define i32 @one_case_2(i32 %x) {
entry:
  switch i32 %x, label %unreachable [
    i32 5, label %a
    i32 10, label %b
    i32 11, label %b
    i32 12, label %b
    i32 13, label %b
  ]

unreachable:                                      ; preds = %entry
  unreachable

a:                                                ; preds = %entry
  %0 = call i32 @f(i32 0)
  ret i32 %0

b:                                                ; preds = %entry, %entry, %entry, %entry
  %1 = call i32 @f(i32 1)
  ret i32 %1
}
tests.current_optimized_program:
declare i32 @f(i32)

define i32 @one_case_2(i32 %x) {
entry:
  %x.off = add i32 %x, -5
  %switch = icmp ult i32 %x.off, 1
  br i1 %switch, label %a, label %b

common.ret:                                       ; preds = %b, %a
  %common.ret.op = phi i32 [ %0, %a ], [ %1, %b ]
  ret i32 %common.ret.op

a:                                                ; preds = %entry
  %0 = call i32 @f(i32 0)
  br label %common.ret

b:                                                ; preds = %entry
  %1 = call i32 @f(i32 1)
  br label %common.ret
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
declare i32 @f(i32)

define i32 @one_case_2(i32 %x) {
entry:
  %0 = icmp eq i32 %x, 5
  br i1 %0, label %a, label %b

common.ret:                                       ; preds = %b, %a
  %common.ret.op = phi i32 [ %1, %a ], [ %2, %b ]
  ret i32 %common.ret.op

a:                                                ; preds = %entry
  %1 = call i32 @f(i32 0)
  br label %common.ret

b:                                                ; preds = %entry
  %2 = call i32 @f(i32 1)
  br label %common.ret
}

tests.test_body:
declare i32 @f(i32)

define i32 @wrapping_known_range(i8 range(i8 0, 6) %arg) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @wrapping_known_range(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ARG_OFF:%.*]] = add i8 [[ARG:%.*]], -1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SWITCH:%.*]] = icmp ult i8 [[ARG_OFF]], 3
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[SWITCH]], label [[ELSE:%.*]], label [[IF:%.*]]
; CHECK:       common.ret:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[COMMON_RET_OP:%.*]] = phi i32 [ [[I0:%.*]], [[IF]] ], [ [[I1:%.*]], [[ELSE]] ]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[COMMON_RET_OP]]
; CHECK:       if:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[I0]] = call i32 @f(i32 0)
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[COMMON_RET:%.*]]
; CHECK:       else:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[I1]] = call i32 @f(i32 1)
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[COMMON_RET]]
  switch i8 %arg, label %else [
    i8 0, label %if
    i8 4, label %if
    i8 5, label %if
  ]

if:                                               ; preds = %0, %0, %0
  %i0 = call i32 @f(i32 0)
  ret i32 %i0

else:                                             ; preds = %0
  %i1 = call i32 @f(i32 1)
  ret i32 %i1
}
tests.source_program:
declare i32 @f(i32)

define i32 @wrapping_known_range(i8 range(i8 0, 6) %arg) {
  switch i8 %arg, label %else [
    i8 0, label %if
    i8 4, label %if
    i8 5, label %if
  ]

if:                                               ; preds = %0, %0, %0
  %i0 = call i32 @f(i32 0)
  ret i32 %i0

else:                                             ; preds = %0
  %i1 = call i32 @f(i32 1)
  ret i32 %i1
}
tests.current_optimized_program:
declare i32 @f(i32)

define i32 @wrapping_known_range(i8 range(i8 0, 6) %arg) {
  switch i8 %arg, label %else [
    i8 0, label %if
    i8 4, label %if
    i8 5, label %if
  ]

common.ret:                                       ; preds = %else, %if
  %common.ret.op = phi i32 [ %i0, %if ], [ %i1, %else ]
  ret i32 %common.ret.op

if:                                               ; preds = %0, %0, %0
  %i0 = call i32 @f(i32 0)
  br label %common.ret

else:                                             ; preds = %0
  %i1 = call i32 @f(i32 1)
  br label %common.ret
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
declare i32 @f(i32)

define i32 @wrapping_known_range(i8 range(i8 0, 6) %arg) {
  %arg.off = add i8 %arg, -1
  %switch = icmp ult i8 %arg.off, 3
  br i1 %switch, label %else, label %if

common.ret:                                       ; preds = %else, %if
  %common.ret.op = phi i32 [ %i0, %if ], [ %i1, %else ]
  ret i32 %common.ret.op

if:                                               ; preds = %0
  %i0 = call i32 @f(i32 0)
  br label %common.ret

else:                                             ; preds = %0
  %i1 = call i32 @f(i32 1)
  br label %common.ret
}

tests.test_body:
declare i32 @f(i32)

define i32 @one_case_1(i32 %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @one_case_1(
; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SWITCH:%.*]] = icmp eq i32 [[X:%.*]], 10
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[SWITCH]], label [[A:%.*]], label [[B:%.*]]
; CHECK:       common.ret:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[COMMON_RET_OP:%.*]] = phi i32 [ [[TMP0:%.*]], [[B]] ], [ [[TMP1:%.*]], [[A]] ]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[COMMON_RET_OP]]
; CHECK:       a:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0]] = call i32 @f(i32 0)
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[COMMON_RET:%.*]]
; CHECK:       b:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1]] = call i32 @f(i32 1)
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[COMMON_RET]]
entry:
  switch i32 %x, label %unreachable [
    i32 5, label %a
    i32 6, label %a
    i32 7, label %a
    i32 10, label %b
  ]

unreachable:                                      ; preds = %entry
  unreachable

a:                                                ; preds = %entry, %entry, %entry
  %0 = call i32 @f(i32 0)
  ret i32 %0

b:                                                ; preds = %entry
  %1 = call i32 @f(i32 1)
  ret i32 %1
}
tests.source_program:
declare i32 @f(i32)

define i32 @one_case_1(i32 %x) {
entry:
  switch i32 %x, label %unreachable [
    i32 5, label %a
    i32 6, label %a
    i32 7, label %a
    i32 10, label %b
  ]

unreachable:                                      ; preds = %entry
  unreachable

a:                                                ; preds = %entry, %entry, %entry
  %0 = call i32 @f(i32 0)
  ret i32 %0

b:                                                ; preds = %entry
  %1 = call i32 @f(i32 1)
  ret i32 %1
}
tests.current_optimized_program:
declare i32 @f(i32)

define i32 @one_case_1(i32 %x) {
entry:
  %x.off = add i32 %x, -5
  %switch = icmp ult i32 %x.off, 3
  br i1 %switch, label %a, label %b

common.ret:                                       ; preds = %b, %a
  %common.ret.op = phi i32 [ %0, %a ], [ %1, %b ]
  ret i32 %common.ret.op

a:                                                ; preds = %entry
  %0 = call i32 @f(i32 0)
  br label %common.ret

b:                                                ; preds = %entry
  %1 = call i32 @f(i32 1)
  br label %common.ret
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
declare i32 @f(i32)

define i32 @one_case_1(i32 %x) {
entry:
  %0 = icmp eq i32 %x, 10
  br i1 %0, label %b, label %a

common.ret:                                       ; preds = %b, %a
  %common.ret.op = phi i32 [ %1, %a ], [ %2, %b ]
  ret i32 %common.ret.op

a:                                                ; preds = %entry
  %1 = call i32 @f(i32 0)
  br label %common.ret

b:                                                ; preds = %entry
  %2 = call i32 @f(i32 1)
  br label %common.ret
}

tests.test_body:
declare i32 @f(i32)

define i32 @no_continuous_wrapping_range(i8 %arg) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @no_continuous_wrapping_range(
; CHECK-NEXT:    switch i8 [[ARG:%.*]], label [[ELSE:%.*]] [
; CHECK-NEXT:      i8 0, label [[IF:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:      i8 -3, label [[IF]]
; CHECK-NEXT:      i8 -1, label [[IF]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ]
; CHECK:       common.ret:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[COMMON_RET_OP:%.*]] = phi i32 [ [[I0:%.*]], [[IF]] ], [ [[I1:%.*]], [[ELSE]] ]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[COMMON_RET_OP]]
; CHECK:       if:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[I0]] = call i32 @f(i32 0)
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[COMMON_RET:%.*]]
; CHECK:       else:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[I1]] = call i32 @f(i32 1)
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[COMMON_RET]]
  switch i8 %arg, label %else [
    i8 0, label %if
    i8 -3, label %if
    i8 -1, label %if
  ]

if:                                               ; preds = %0, %0, %0
  %i0 = call i32 @f(i32 0)
  ret i32 %i0

else:                                             ; preds = %0
  %i1 = call i32 @f(i32 1)
  ret i32 %i1
}

tests.test_body:
declare i32 @f(i32)

define i32 @wrapping_range(i8 %arg) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @wrapping_range(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ARG_OFF:%.*]] = add i8 [[ARG:%.*]], -1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SWITCH:%.*]] = icmp ult i8 [[ARG_OFF]], -4
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[SWITCH]], label [[ELSE:%.*]], label [[IF:%.*]]
; CHECK:       common.ret:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[COMMON_RET_OP:%.*]] = phi i32 [ [[I0:%.*]], [[IF]] ], [ [[I1:%.*]], [[ELSE]] ]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[COMMON_RET_OP]]
; CHECK:       if:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[I0]] = call i32 @f(i32 0)
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[COMMON_RET:%.*]]
; CHECK:       else:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[I1]] = call i32 @f(i32 1)
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[COMMON_RET]]
  switch i8 %arg, label %else [
    i8 0, label %if
    i8 -3, label %if
    i8 -2, label %if
    i8 -1, label %if
  ]

if:                                               ; preds = %0, %0, %0, %0
  %i0 = call i32 @f(i32 0)
  ret i32 %i0

else:                                             ; preds = %0
  %i1 = call i32 @f(i32 1)
  ret i32 %i1
}
